method.question: If Lane1 accepted LONDON_NY_OVERLAP as a session, how many rejected overlap records appear regime-eligible under Lane1-style long conditions?
explicit_limitations: Does not evaluate H1 setup on rejected overlap records.
Does not create a new lane.
Does not create signal or trade proposal authority.

last_24h.interpretation: Many rejected overlap records appear regime-eligible under Lane1-style long conditions. A separate Lane1B overlap shadow variant is worth a controlled patch.

latest_overlap_preflight_pass_records.important_caveat: This is a session/regime what-if only. It does not evaluate setup, H1 trigger, M15 confirm, or shadow outcome.
